name: hb_1_10
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Jinan Steel Group Co., Ltd. (registered name: 冀南钢铁集团有限公司) over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-11 compute and store: total_flue_gas, mean_flue_gas, peak_flue_gas (float), cv_flue_gas (population std / mean of hourly flue-gas, float).

turns.query: Analyze hourly emission variations of Jinan Steel Group Co., Ltd. during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-11.
